title: Lifestyle goal setting
specialty: Preventive care / screening / counseling / administrative documentation
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Supports comorbidity, social or mental-health context, diet or activity goals, previous attempts, experiences, barriers, preferences, clinician-agreed intervention, and preference-sensitive referral documentation.
assessment.rationale: Supports context, previous attempts, barriers, preferences and clinician-agreed intervention for lifestyle goal setting; no decision is generated.

source.title: Overweight and obesity management
source.population: Adults, children, and young people with overweight, obesity, or central adiposity, subject to section-specific age criteria.
source.setting: Identification, sensitive discussion, assessment, behavioural intervention, referral, and follow-up.
source.exclusions: Exact for selected permission-sensitive adult weight discussion, measurements, context, previous attempts, goals, clinician-discussed intervention or referral, and follow-up fields. It does not support automatic advice, medicine selection, dosing, or UAE referral pathways.

exact_location.heading: Recommendations 1.11.1–1.11.14 — results, context, intervention discussion, and referral

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports comorbidity, social or mental-health context, diet or activity goals, previous attempts, experiences, barriers, preferences, clinician-agreed intervention, and preference-sensitive referral documentation.

assessment.text: Supports documenting personalised goals, progress, barriers, support, and clinician-arranged review without inserting automatic lifestyle instructions.
assessment.rationale: Supports personalised goals, progress and follow-up for lifestyle goal setting; no decision is generated.
